_meta.name: ALM 14B r12 LoRA — 2-H100 FSDP halvening (fresh-from-base)
_meta.purpose: r12 is the halvened-wallclock re-run of r11. Identical trajectory invariants (lr/steps/lora/corpus), but runs on a 2×H100 SXM single-pod FSDP data-parallel recipe. Expected wallclock 2h vs r11 4h, same cost (~$12). Fresh-from-base per feedback_no_resume_data_change — r12 is NOT a resume, it is a step-0 run from Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.
_meta.status: CONFIG READY. Launch GATED on: (a) libhxnccl.so built on H100 pod with CUDA+NCCL (training/build/build_libhxnccl.hexa --with-nccl); (b) r11 on pod 87xscivuggrwvk reached terminal state or user approves 2nd pod; (c) hxqwen14b Day-2 LoRA ABI landed OR fall-back stub mode accepted. DO NOT AUTO-FIRE per task spec.

no_resume_rationale: Per feedback_no_resume_data_change: r12 changes hardware layout (1-GPU → 2-GPU FSDP) + effective micro-batch semantics → fresh start mandatory. Step 0 from Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct base. Fresh ckpt directory. r11 adapter MUST NOT be loaded as base.

base.name: Qwen/Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct
base.adapter_source_rationale: EXPLICITLY null — r12 starts fresh-from-base like r11. No r11 adapter stacking (would violate feedback_no_resume_data_change since hardware layout changed).

topology.path: A — single pod, 2×H100 SXM, FULL_SHARD intra-node NVLink
topology.path_rationale: Matches alm_r11_fsdp_plan_20260420.topology_chosen. H100 SXM NVLink (~600GB/s) keeps NCCL AllReduce latency off the critical path. Rejects Path B (2 separate pods + RDMA) because inter-pod bandwidth < intra-node by 10×.

fsdp.mixed_precision: bf16 (MixedPrecision with reduce=fp32 for numerical precision)
fsdp.ffi_build_cmd: hexa run training/build/build_libhxnccl.hexa   # CUDA_HOME defaults to /usr/local/cuda
fsdp.ffi_build_host: H100 pod (CUDA 12.4 + NCCL 2.x); Mac build is stub-only
fsdp.nan_guard: NCCL_P2P_LEVEL=NVL env required for H100 SXM NVLink peer-to-peer

training.effective_batch_rationale: 2 ranks × 4 per-rank = 8 global. r11 was 4 global. Larger batch reduces per-step loss variance — abort thresholds below are re-calibrated +0.5 headroom to avoid false-positive aborts at larger batch. Trajectory invariants (lr/steps/etc) otherwise unchanged so halvening is pure wallclock, not behavioural.
training.lr_rationale: Unchanged from r11. Larger effective batch could tolerate higher lr, but r11 trajectory is the known-good and changing lr would violate feedback_no_resume_data_change if r12 were a resume; for fresh-from-base it is allowed but we keep lr constant to isolate the FSDP variable.

lora.rationale: Identical to r11. LoRA is cheap enough that SHARDED_STATE_DICT is a convenience, not a necessity — all ranks can hold full LoRA adapter (~7.9M params). Only base-model params are shard-distributed. Saves are rank-0-only in the current trainer wire.

corpus.path_rationale: Distinct filename from corpus_alm_r11.jsonl so operator can verify which corpus is being used. Content-identical to r11 (same blend + preprocessing) — the only variable r12 changes is topology. If r11 corpus produced good results, r12 must reuse it to isolate the FSDP variable.
corpus.reuse_r11_corpus: Preferred: symlink /workspace/anima/training/corpus_alm_r12.jsonl -> corpus_alm_r11.jsonl (byte-identical reuse is explicitly allowed since this is not a resume; data is unchanged, trajectory is fresh)

trainer.rank_launch_pattern: Single-process ncclCommInitAll: launcher spawns ONE train_alm_lora process with --world_size 2 --rank 0. hxnccl_init creates a comm per local device inside the one process. (Multi-process torchrun-equiv would need per-rank launches with --rank 0 / --rank 1 separately — NOT used in r12.)
abi_required: hxqwen14b Day-2 LoRA ABI (forward_with_lora, backward_lora_only, apply_lora_delta) — ALSO required for r11; shared prerequisite
libhxnccl.so built with CUDA 12.4 + NCCL 2.x on the pod
trainer.fallback: If libhxnccl.so is stub build (hxnccl_version==0) and --world_size > 1 → trainer refuses to start with a clear error pointing to training/build/build_libhxnccl.hexa. World_size=1 works with stub.

expected_metrics.loss_step100_check: ≤ 5.5 — larger batch gives +0.5 headroom over r11's 5.0 (recalibrated)
expected_metrics.loss_step200_abort: > 6.5 → abort (recalibrated +0.5 from r11's 6.0 for larger batch)

abort_criteria: loss > 5.5 at step 100 → warn (lr near upper limit for batch=8)
loss > 6.5 at step 200 → kill (lr too high for this batch)
loss decreasing but eval_loss diverging → kill (overfitting)
Korean stays-in-language ratio < 0.7 at step 300 → kill
NCCL timeout or AllReduce error → kill (NVLink / comm broken)
post_training_eval: language consistency: 30 Korean prompts → no KO→ZH/JA switches

blocked_by: feedback_h100_authorized caps at 2 pods; r11 currently on 87xscivuggrwvk, so r12 pod MUST replace it (not stack) — launch only after r11 reaches terminal state
libhxnccl.so not yet built on any H100 pod (training/build/build_libhxnccl.hexa --with-nccl required)
hxqwen14b Day-2 LoRA ABI (shared with r11)

blocks.forbidden_resume_rationale: r12 is fresh-from-base. No prior adapter may be loaded (feedback_no_resume_data_change).

ready_for_launch_rationale: Config + FSDP wire + libhxnccl.c shim landed 2026-04-20. Launch is still GATED on: (1) libhxnccl.so built on H100 pod (not Mac stub); (2) 2×H100 SXM pod allocation after r11 terminates; (3) hxqwen14b Day-2 LoRA ABI (shared r11 prerequisite); (4) corpus_alm_r12.jsonl file present on pod. DO NOT AUTO-FIRE — per task spec step 7, this config is PREP ONLY.
auto_fire_rationale: Task spec step 7 explicit: 'DO NOT FIRE r12 training — just prep config ready'. Launch is operator-gated; the watchdog that fires r11 does not apply to r12.

compliance.c_ffi_rationale: libhxnccl.c is an @extern FFI boundary — explicitly allowed per feedback_ai_native_clm.md ('may FFI to CUDA/NCCL shared libraries from .hexa'). Same precedent as hxblas/hxqwen14b/hxccl.
compliance.no_quantization_evidence: bf16 weights + bf16 AllReduce + fp32 reduce; no 4/8-bit anywhere
compliance.h100_authorized_evidence: r12 pod replaces r11 pod (not stacked); within 2-pod cap
compliance.h100_free_use_evidence: Config does not auto-fire; pod spins only after r11 terminates
compliance.no_version_evidence: Filename uses round number r12 (like r11/r10/r9) not v2/v3 suffix

cites: training/train_alm_lora.hexa — FSDP wire landed (init + AllReduce + rank-0 save + teardown)
training/build/libhxnccl.c — NCCL 2.x bf16 AllReduce FFI shim
training/build/build_libhxnccl.hexa — Linux real build + Mac stub build
memory:feedback_no_resume_data_change — fresh step 0 mandatory when hw/data/params change
memory:feedback_ai_native_clm — CUDA/NCCL FFI allowed from hexa
memory:feedback_py_ban_total — no Python accelerate runner fallback
